en: Then Job answered and said:
zh: 約伯回答說：

en: "I have heard many such things; miserable comforters are you all.
zh: “像這樣的話，我聽了很多； 你們都是叫人愁煩的安慰者。

en: Shall windy words have an end? Or what provokes you that you answer?
zh: 虛空的言語，有窮盡嗎？ 或有甚麼惹你答個不休的呢？

en: I also could speak as you do, if you were in my place; I could join words together against you and shake my head at you.
zh: 你們若處在我的景況， 我也能像你們那樣說話， 我也能砌辭攻擊你們， 並且能向你們搖頭。

en: I could strengthen you with my mouth, and the solace of my lips would assuage your pain.
zh: 我能用口鼓勵你們， 我嘴唇的安慰，能緩和你們的痛苦。

en: "If I speak, my pain is not assuaged, and if I forbear, how much of it leaves me?
zh: 我若說話，痛苦仍不消解， 我若閉口不說，痛苦也不離開我。

en: Surely now God has worn me out; he has made desolate all my company.
zh: 現在 神使我困倦， ‘你蹂躪了我的全家，

en: And he has shriveled me up, which is a witness against me, and my leanness has risen up against me; it testifies to my face.
zh: 又把我捆綁起來。’這就作為證據； 我身體的枯瘦也當面作證反對我。

en: He has torn me in his wrath and hated me; he has gnashed his teeth at me; my adversary sharpens his eyes against me.
zh: 他的怒氣撕裂我，攻擊我； 他向我咬牙切齒， 我的敵人以銳利的眼光看著我。

en: Men have gaped at me with their mouth; they have struck me insolently on the cheek; they mass themselves together against me.
zh: 他們向我大大張嘴， 以蔑視的態度打我的臉頰， 聯合一起攻擊我。

en: God gives me up to the ungodly and casts me into the hands of the wicked.
zh: 神把我交給不義的人， 把我丟在惡人的手中。

en: I was at ease, and he broke me apart; he seized me by the neck and dashed me to pieces; he set me up as his target;
zh: 我本來安逸，他卻把我壓碎； 掐著我的頸項，把我摔碎； 又把我當作他的箭靶。

en: his archers surround me. He slashes open my kidneys and does not spare; he pours out my gall on the ground.
zh: 他的弓箭手四面包圍我， 他剖開我的腰子，全不顧惜， 把我的膽傾倒在地上。

en: He breaks me with breach upon breach; he runs upon me like a warrior.
zh: 他把我破傷，在破口上又加破傷， 如勇士一般向我直衝。

en: I have sewed sackcloth upon my skin and have laid my strength in the dust.
zh: 我把麻布縫在我的皮膚上， 把我的角插入塵土中。

en: My face is red with weeping, and on my eyelids is deep darkness,
zh: 我的臉因哭泣而發紅， 在我的眼皮上滿是黑影。

en: although there is no violence in my hands, and my prayer is pure.
zh: 然而在我的手中沒有強暴， 我的禱告也是清潔的。

en: "O earth, cover not my blood, and let my cry find no resting place.
zh: 地啊，不要遮蓋我的血； 不要讓我的哀求有停留的地方。

en: Even now, behold, my witness is in heaven, and he who testifies for me is on high.
zh: 現今，在天上有我的見證， 在高天之上，有我的證人。

en: My friends scorn me; my eye pours out tears to God,
zh: 譏笑我的，就是我的朋友， 我的眼向 神流淚。

en: that he would argue the case of a man with God, as a son of man does with his neighbor.
zh: 但願人可以為人與 神分辯， 正如世人為朋友辯白一樣。

en: For when a few years have come I shall go the way from which I shall not return.
zh: 因為我的年數將盡， 我快要走上那條一去不返的路。”
